commit_message:
Do not duplicate cache signals in Harvard mode Do not duplicate cache signals in Harvard mode I had to use this trivial change, in order to have the default `make` command to work.
Here is the original error:
```
../rtl/darkbridge.v:128: error: 'YDREQ' has already been declared in this scope.
../rtl/darkbridge.v:56:      : It was declared here as a net.
...
```
With this fix, the build and test both work fine.

Do not duplicate cache signals in Harvard mode Do not duplicate cache signals in Harvard mode I had to use this trivial change, in order to have the default `make` command to work.
Here is the original error:
```
../rtl/darkbridge.v:128: error: 'YDREQ' has already been declared in this scope.
../rtl/darkbridge.v:56:      : It was declared here as a net.
...
```
With this fix, the build and test both work fine.
